subcodes.first_line: O Siyavash! The Turks did spill the blood of Siyavash, severing his head and, with cruelty and injustice, his sacred form [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سیاوش ترکان خون سیاوش را هدر دادند سر ببریدند و دم مطهرش را بظلم و جفا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @differences in human capacity
